caption.full:
Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, Rob Morgan join 'Mini War' cast

Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, and Rob Morgan are set to star in the upcoming comedy 'Mini War'. They join previously announced leads Luke Wilson and Vanessa Hudgens. The film centers on a stoner who inherits a mini-golf course and feuds with a go-kart track owner.

Which new cast pairing has you most excited for Mini War?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #MiniWar #Comedy
caption.firstComment: Brett Gelman as an eccentric investor from Milwaukee sounds wonderfully odd — who here is already imagining the chaos he’ll bring to the mini-golf course?

youtube.title: Brett Gelman Joins 'Mini War' Comedy Cast
youtube.description:
Brett Gelman is set to star in the upcoming comedy 'Mini War' alongside Luke Wilson and Vanessa Hudgens. Gelman will play Ned Parker, an eccentric investor from Milwaukee eager to purchase the mini-golf course Wilson's character inherits. The film centers on a stoner inheriting a mini-golf course and feuding with a go-kart track owner.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
